description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a mix of brick and wood siding on the exterior. The front features a paved driveway with a parked car, a garage, and a small outdoor seating area with a fire pit. The backyard includes a large grassy area, a round above-ground pool, a hot tub, a sandbox, and a swing set, making it family-friendly. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the main entryway is marked by a set of double doors with glass panes. The roof is primarily gabled with asphalt shingles, and the house has multiple chimneys and dormer windows. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural styles.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, brick and wood siding, a garage, and a family-friendly backyard featuring a pool, hot tub, and playground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with a car, main entryway, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a pool, hot tub, sandbox, and swing set.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, hot tub, swing set, and the rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: Side view with the garage, driveway, and a clear look at the gable roof and backyard features.
attribute_architectural_style: Colonial Revival with modern suburban elements
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass-paneled doors with a paved approach, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
